footer.intro_desc: A free, on-device self-assessment tool utilizing crown and hairline image contrast to monitor hair loss. Check your status safely in your browser in 30 seconds, with zero server uploads.
footer.seo_desc: Optimized sitemaps and robots.txt protocols are live for search engines. Download details below to inspect our schema.
footer.disclaimer_text: All test results, scores, and medical articles provided by Hair Loss Checker are for informational and motivational self-screening purposes only. They are not a substitute for formal diagnosis, clinical evaluation, or prescribing treatments by qualified dermatologists or medical experts. Always seek professional offline medical consultation for hair and scalp issues.

home.title: Free Hair Loss Analysis in Your Browser (30 Sec)
home.desc: Check your crown and hairline with just 2 photos. Utilizing secure pixel-level contrast analysis to estimate hair density, progression speed, and your hair loss risk score instantly.
home.bullet1_desc: Your privacy is fully protected. Photos are processed directly within sandboxed local memory and instantly destroyed without any server uploads.
home.bullet2_desc: Analyzes localized chroma variations, scalp reflection levels, and hair-to-cutaneous boundaries to calculate density metrics.
home.bullet3_desc: Unlock customized hair health guidelines tailored to your specific crown and hairline results.
home.steps_title: Check Your Hair in 3 Simple Steps
home.step1_desc: Select two clear photos: one showing your crown (vertex) scalp parting, and one showing your front hairline.
home.step2_desc: The local engine scans hair density, follicles, and thinning patterns while filtering out shadow and lightning disturbances.
home.step3_desc: View your personalized risk scores, metric details, and curated preventative articles on hair growth.

checker.title: Precision Hair Loss Scanner
checker.desc: Please upload one photo of your crown (top) and one of your hairline. Under our secure on-device policy, your images will never leave your browser.
checker.vertex_guide: Ensure your crown is well-lit and centered. Part the hair naturally so the scalp boundary is clearly visible.
checker.hairline_guide: Take a photo of your front hairline from the forehead up, showing M-line boundaries or receding hair patterns.
checker.unsupported_images: Supports JPEG, PNG, and other web formats
checker.alert_select_both: Please upload both crown and hairline photos to proceed with the precision diagnostic.

result.title: Comprehensive Self-Diagnostic Report
result.safety_badge: 🔒 100% Secure Local Scan (All photos destroyed instantly)
result.sec_rec_desc: Curated columns and guidelines targeting crown renewal or hairline boundary protection.
result.status_good_desc: Chroma contrast and follicular density are healthy. Maintain your current washing guidelines and scalp care.
result.status_warn_desc: Detecting mild follicular miniaturization and thinning. We recommend cooling therapies, biotin nutrients, and improved sleep hygiene.
result.status_danger_desc: High scalp transparency. If hair thinning is active, seek consultation with a clinical dermatologist for approved therapies.

wiki.title: Medical Hair Loss Library
wiki.subtitle: Curated by Dermatological Advisors • 70 Comprehensive Volumes
wiki.desc: Explore clinical insights on crown maintenance, M-line restoration, approved medication guidelines, and proven nutrient benefits.
wiki.search_placeholder: Search by keywords... (e.g., yeast, dht, minoxidil, stress)
wiki.matches_none_sub: Try searching with alternative medical or lifestyle terms.

article_detail.dynamic_faq_desc: Dispelling common myths of hair preservation backed by scientific evidence
article_detail.checker_cta_title: Want to check your exact hair risk index?

intro.title: Democratizing Hair Health & Secure On-Device Architecture
intro.p1: Hair Loss Checker is a browser-sanboxed, intelligence-driven self-assessment utility designed to bridge the gap between people suffering from hair thinning anxieties and scientific, proven clinical knowledge in 30 seconds.
intro.p2: Far too often, those experiencing hair thinning fall prey to viral unproven remedies, expensive cosmetic shampoos, or marketing scams, losing valuable golden times and thousands of dollars before consulting actual medical experts.
intro.p3: We developed a local pixel contrast monitoring solution for crown regions and hairline boundaries, ensuring complete visual clarity for early detection.
intro.p4: Priding ourselves on extreme compliance, your uploaded photos are never processed on external database servers. They remain inside local sandboxed browser memory and are deleted immediately upon completion, protecting your privacy entirely with no risk of database leaks.

contact.title: Support & Corporate Partnership Channels
contact.desc: We democratize critical health information for hair loss prevention. Feel free to reach out to our medical coordination and partnership team.
